name: Chicken with Peppercorn Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Grind the salt, pepper, paprika, garlic, and basil until it is a powder.
2. Sprinkle the powdered mixture over the chicken breasts.
3. Heat the cooking oil in a frying pan and sauté the chicken until cooked but not overcooked or dry.
4. In another frying pan brushed with remaining cooking oil, sauté onions until transparent.
5. Add white wine to the onions and reduce until it forms a syrup.
6. Add half of the green peppercorns and crush them in the pan.
7. Add chicken stock and reduce by half.
8. Transfer the liquid into a blender and blend until smooth.
9. Return the blended mixture to the frying pan, add the remaining green peppercorns (do not crush), and 35% cream.
10. Cook slowly until the mixture thickens.
11. Pour over the cooked chicken breasts and enjoy.
